scenario: Existing product screen looks plain/inconsistent — want a polished pass that respects the design system
when_to_pick: You have a working screen and want craft brought up without inventing a new system

scenario: Brand-new feature — want a clickable HTML/CSS prototype before committing to engineering
when_to_pick: You're pre-implementation and want a runnable artifact to react to

scenario: Stakeholder deck due this week — narrative arc, slide composition, visual language
when_to_pick: Strategic deck where audience and arc matter more than visuals

scenario: Design system has tokens but no documented component vocabulary — want a spec
when_to_pick: You're authoring a system, not just consuming one

scenario: Review an existing UI artifact for visual-craft issues (hierarchy, type, color, anti-slop)
when_to_pick: You have a finished artifact and want findings, not a redesign
